Shallow submodules (from repository root). Adjust branch/tag as needed; URLs follow typical upstreams.

Bereits im Repo:
  - third_party/freecad — https://github.com/FreeCAD/FreeCAD.git (branch main, --depth 1)

Weitere Beispiele (noch nicht angelegt):

  git submodule add --depth 1 https://github.com/Open-Cascade-SAS/OCCT.git third_party/occt
  git submodule add --depth 1 https://github.com/coin3d/coin.git third_party/coin
  git submodule add --depth 1 https://github.com/NGSolve/netgen.git third_party/netgen
  git submodule add --depth 1 https://github.com/coin3d/pivy.git third_party/pivy

scmesh: project-specific (SMESH / mesh stack). Clone the repository you use with FreeCAD into third_party/scmesh and document the URL here.

Nach Änderungen: git submodule update --init --recursive --depth 1  (oder: pixi run submodules-init)
